class.description: Vector Field Histogram Plus (VFH+) reactive local controller. Builds a polar histogram of obstacles around the robot (each enlarged by the robot radius), reduces it to free/blocked angular sectors, and steers toward the free sector best balancing goal heading, turning effort, and smoothness. Classical (non-learned) and not part of upstream Nav2 (which ships DWB, MPPI, Regulated Pure Pursuit). Stops when no plan is set or the goal is reached.
